app.title: Anno Map Editor
start.game_path_help: Point to the folder that contains the Bin/ and maindata/ subfolders. Under Steam this is typically …/steamapps/compatdata/.../drive_c/.../Anno 117 - Pax Romana/
main.no_selection_hint: Click an island or a starting spot to see its details.
save_dialog.title: Save as mod
save_dialog.name: Mod name
save_dialog.help: The mod will be created in Anno 117's mods folder. To activate it, launch the game and select it from the mod manager (or drop the folder into …/Anno 117 - Pax Romana/mods/).
save_dialog.warning: ⚠ Binary export still experimental on Linux: if the game refuses the mod, it's most likely a FileDB V3 detail to fix — let us know.
status.reserved_name: ⚠ « {0} » is a reserved Anno name (Default/Donut/Corners…). Choose another name.
status.mods_path_unknown: ⚠ Mods folder path unknown — check StartWindow.
